basic_details.job_title: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Registrar and House Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Registrar and House Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 22 June 2026 on the official website portal.mcgm.gov.in. The Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Registrar and House Officer Recruitment 2026 invites eligible candidates to apply for Registrar and House Officer posts on a contractual basis.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for Backward Class Candidates

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for Backward Class Candidates

rows.event: Application Form Availability and Submission Start

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Registrar and House Officer posts is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.B.B.S. degree to be eligible for the Registrar and House Officer positions advertised by Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 33 years. However, age relaxation is provided for candidates belonging to Backward Classes.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates belonging to Backward Classes are eligible for an age relaxation of 5 years over and above the maximum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 507/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. This fee needs to be paid as part of the application process.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Registrar and House Officer posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Registrar is Rs. 81572/- per month, and for House Officer, it is Rs. 80757/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Counseling and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. What is the tenure of the contract for these posts?
faq.answer: The tenure for these contractual posts is until 31st January 2027. This provides a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika's official website. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.
